# Module
add_subdirectory (acado EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)
add_subdirectory (apriltag EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)
add_subdirectory (hfsm EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)
add_subdirectory (nanoflann_pcl EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)
add_subdirectory (nlohmann_json EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)
add_subdirectory (osqp EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)
add_subdirectory (rapidjson EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)
add_subdirectory (eigen EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)
add_subdirectory (SQLiteCpp EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)
add_subdirectory (system_monitor)

if(ADAPTER STREQUAL "cyber")
    if(NOT CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE STREQUAL "Release")
        add_subdirectory (Pangolin EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)
    endif()
elseif(ADAPTER STREQUAL "ap")
    add_subdirectory(gflags EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)
    add_subdirectory(glog EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)
endif()
